## BaseDropdown class

Dropdown component that mimics a Select element behavior, but with the option to customize the toggle button and each item contents.

<b>Signature:</b>

```typescript
export default class BaseDropdown extends Vue 
```
<b>Extends:</b> Vue

## Properties

|  Property | Modifiers | Type | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- | --- |
|  [$refs](./x-components.basedropdown._refs.md) |  | { itemButtons: HTMLButtonElement\[\]; } |  |
|  [animation](./x-components.basedropdown.animation.md) |  | typeof Vue \| string | Animation component to use for expanding the dropdown. This is a single element animation, so only <code>&lt;transition&gt;</code> components are allowed. |
|  [items](./x-components.basedropdown.items.md) |  | DropdownItem\[\] | List of items to display. |
|  [searchTimeoutMs](./x-components.basedropdown.searchtimeoutms.md) |  | number | Time to wait without receiving any keystroke before resetting the items search query. |
|  [value](./x-components.basedropdown.value.md) |  | DropdownItem \| null | The selected item. |

## Methods

|  Method | Modifiers | Description |
|  --- | --- | --- |
|  [closeIfEventIsOutOfDropdown(event)](./x-components.basedropdown.closeifeventisoutofdropdown.md) |  | Closes the dropdown if the passed event has happened on an element out of the dropdown. |
